description_long: This is a military-style twin-engine airplane with a dark green and gray camouflage paint scheme, featuring roundels and insignia on the wings and fuselage. The aircraft has a straight, mid-mounted wing configuration with red-tipped winglets and two engines mounted on the wings. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from the rear fuselage. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a clear canopy, providing visibility for the crew. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with two main wheels under the wings and a nose wheel under the cockpit. The airplane's surface appears metallic and smooth, with some matte areas and visible panel lines.
description: A military-style, twin-engine airplane with a green camouflage pattern, mid-mounted straight wings, and a conventional tail. It features an enclosed forward cockpit and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the twin engines on the wings, roundels, and the full length of the fuselage and tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the straight wings, twin engines, and the single vertical stabilizer of the tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the engines, cockpit, and tail details, with visible insignia and markings.
description_view_3: Front view showing the nose, cockpit canopy, tricycle landing gear, and the symmetrical wing layout.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and red-tipped winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston engines mounted on the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a multi-seat canopy and clear windows.
